idea-plugin.name: Face Transform MCP
idea-plugin.description:
Face Analysis & Transformation via the AceDataCloud Face API suite, exposed through Model Context Protocol (MCP).

This plugin sets up the MCP Face Transform server for JetBrains AI Assistant. Once configured, AI Assistant can detect keypoints, beautify portraits, age or de-age faces, swap perceived gender, transplant a face onto a different scene, cartoonize a portrait, and run liveness checks — all powered by Ace Data Cloud.

Features

  • 8 MCP Tools — Cover the full AceDataCloud Face API surface
  • Easy Setup — One-click copy MCP configuration for AI Assistant
  • Dual Mode — STDIO (local) and HTTP (remote) server support
  • Token Management — Store API token securely in IDE settings

Available Tools

  • Keypoint Detection — 90+ landmarks per face
  • Beautify — Smoothing, whitening, face slimming, eye enlarging
  • Age & Gender Transform — Age, de-age, swap facial gender
  • Face Swap — Move a source face onto a target image (async webhook supported)
  • Cartoonize — Render a portrait in cartoon style
  • Liveness Detection — Distinguish live captures from printed/screen photos

Quick Start

  1. Install this plugin
  2. Open Settings → Tools → Face Transform MCP
  3. Enter your Ace Data Cloud API token
  4. Click Copy Config and paste into Settings → Tools → AI Assistant → MCP

Requires uv (Python package runner) for STDIO mode, or use HTTP mode for zero-install remote access.

action.description: Copy STDIO MCP configuration for AI Assistant
Copy HTTP MCP configuration for AI Assistant

idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.1.0

  • Initial release
  • MCP server integration with JetBrains AI Assistant
  • STDIO and HTTP transport modes
  • Settings UI for API token management
  • One-click MCP config copy
